Spring Data LDAP
  1. org.springframework.data.ldap.repository.query

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.ldap.repository.query

Packages that use org.springframework.data.ldap.repository.query
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.ldap.repository.query
Query derivation mechanism for LDAP specific repositories.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.ldap.repository.query used by org.springframework.data.ldap.repository.query
    Class
    Description
    AbstractLdapRepositoryQuery
    Base class for RepositoryQuery implementations for LDAP.
    LdapParameterAccessor
    LDAP-specific ParameterAccessor exposing all bindable parameters.
    LdapParameters
    Custom extension of Parameters discovering additional
    LdapParameters.LdapParameter
    Custom Parameter implementation adding parameters of type Distance to the special ones.
    LdapQueryMethod
    QueryMethod for Ldap Queries.
